# CGIC — Staffing & Consulting

> CGIC is a staffing and consulting company based in Brussels, Belgium.
> We connect top talent with companies shaping tomorrow's world.

## Company Information

- **Name**: CGIC (CG International Consulting SRL)
- **Website**: https://www.cgic.be
- **Industry**: Staffing & Consulting
- **Location**: 523 Avenue Louise, 1050 Brussels, Belgium
- **Languages**: French, English, Dutch
- **LEI**: 875500UBAMWWIUVFT022
- **DUNS**: 37-199-0796

## Services

- IT Staffing: Identifying and deploying top technology profiles for critical projects
- Strategic Consulting: Senior consultants guiding strategy definition and execution
- Project Management: End-to-end digital transformation project management
- Permanent Recruitment: Finding lasting talent for organizations
- Training & Coaching: Custom development programs for teams
- Audit & Advisory: In-depth process assessment and optimization recommendations

## Contact

- Email: cedric.grauwels@cgic.be

- Address: 523 Avenue Louise, 1050 Brussels, Belgium
